events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario involves fall protection equipment with frayed/burned webbing. This is clearly defective and must be removed from service. OSHA 1910.140 and 1926 Subpart M require that personal fall protection equipment be inspected and removed from service if damaged. Frayed or burned webbing compromises the strength of the harness/lanyard.
